title: Macaw's Oh The Biomes You'll Go / We've Gone
description: A compatibility between Macaw's Mods and the different woods and stones of Oh The Biomes You'll Go / We've Gone
body:
This mod adds compatibility between Macaw's Mods and Oh The Biomes You'll Go, have you always dreamed of making an aspen bridge... well thanks to this mod it is now something possible!

I had installed Macaw's Bridges/Fences/Roofs/Furnitures - BYG, I am afraid that by installing this mod it will delete all my bridges already placed.

Don't worry,
For forge version mod converts all the old blocks and items from the old compatibilitie.
For fabric a mod has been made dependent for the moment, you'll need to use this mod with a pre-filled configuration file to automatically replace the blocks, these files are generated when the game is launched like the config files - more information [here](https://github.com/Samlegamer/Macaw-s-Addons/issues/2)

This mod supported :  

- Macaw's Bridges
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s4B19O5h/images/605a6caea51b4fe460f75532d19567b04d2d4069.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s4B19O5h/images/605a6caea51b4fe460f75532d19567b04d2d4069.png)
- Macaw's Roofs
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s4B19O5h/images/c7e29710966042df6e60bc6c247bf7631d4dc110.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s4B19O5h/images/c7e29710966042df6e60bc6c247bf7631d4dc110.png)
- Macaw's Fences
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s4B19O5h/images/0ece1b26666587fc70b604ea631011f4dfb8a3f8.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s4B19O5h/images/0ece1b26666587fc70b604ea631011f4dfb8a3f8.png)
- Macaw's Furnitures
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s4B19O5h/images/23979eff98731af42bd4d65d874f056765d8b137.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s4B19O5h/images/23979eff98731af42bd4d65d874f056765d8b137.png)
- Macaw's Stairs
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s4B19O5h/images/abf0ff60e400a4594191e4c8cda0d084d4218741.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s4B19O5h/images/abf0ff60e400a4594191e4c8cda0d084d4218741.png)

**_1.1 Update_**

- Macaw's Paths
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s4B19O5h/images/8eb705cb80d2fc727b4e9d4562115cec015428ee.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s4B19O5h/images/8eb705cb80d2fc727b4e9d4562115cec015428ee.png)
- Macaw's Doors
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s4B19O5h/images/2b9e33ddcbb76cfb70e37c01f6d8e1fdbb0517d5.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s4B19O5h/images/2b9e33ddcbb76cfb70e37c01f6d8e1fdbb0517d5.png)
- Macaw's Trapdoors
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s4B19O5h/images/3dd7e1368fafda596217f2a0128c3519bc659aaa.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s4B19O5h/images/3dd7e1368fafda596217f2a0128c3519bc659aaa.png)
- Macaw's Windows
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s4B19O5h/images/8d125fbc502390dec1bb7ba7d6bddf7612dd830c.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s4B19O5h/images/8d125fbc502390dec1bb7ba7d6bddf7612dd830c.png)

Required Depedency:

- [AddonsLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/addonslib)
- [Oh The Biomes You'll Go](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomesyougo) AND FOR 1.20.1+ [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone)
- [TerraBlender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender) for 1.18.2+
- [UpdateFixerUpper](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/updatefixerupper) for Fabric 1.18.2-1.19.2
- [Configurable Data Fixers](https://modrinth.com/mod/configurable-data-fixers) for Fabric 1.19.3-1.20.1

Optional Dependency:

- [Macaw's Mods](https://modrinth.com/user/sketchmacaw)
